s-1.ptxt: FRONT SEAT SIDE AIRBAG ASSEMBLY (VEHICLE NOT INVOLVED IN COLLISION)

s2.ptxt: Perform a diagnostic system check (See page ).
With the front seat side airbag assembly installed on the vehicle, perform a visual check. If there are any defects as mentioned below, replace the front seat assembly with a new one:

item.ptxt: Cuts, minute cracks or marked discoloration on the front seatback assembly around the front seat side airbag assembly.

s-1.ptxt: FRONT SEAT SIDE AIRBAG ASSEMBLY (VEHICLE INVOLVED IN COLLISION AND AIRBAG HAS NOT DEPLOYED)

s2.ptxt: Perform a diagnostic system check (See page ).
With the front seat side airbag assembly removed from the vehicle, perform a visual check. If there are any defects as mentioned below, replace the front seat side airbag assembly with a new one:

item.ptxt: Cuts, minute cracks or marked discoloration on the front seat side airbag assembly.
Cracks or other damage to the wire harness or connector.

atten2.ptxt: Be sure to follow the correct removal and installation procedures.
